node.name: Great Plains Natural Woodlands
description: 0. Vegetation in a relatively natural state, dominated by native species; little or no evidence of trees in a row, no very recent logging, understory mowing, etc. (trees may be early successional pole-sized trees following logging or blowdowns). Tree composition not dominated by ruderal native or exotic species (< 80% RIV) (See Appendix B - needs to be refined for this Division).................Great Plains Natural Woodlands
